Our Story

A Team That
Bridges Worlds

We built the sourcing partner we wished existed when we started.

Why We Exist

Built From Frustration,
Driven by Purpose

CrossPals was founded by a team of trade veterans and entrepreneurs who witnessed how difficult it was for overseas startups to access reliable Chinese suppliers. Language barriers, fraud risk, and opaque pricing were killing promising businesses before they started.

We built CrossPals to be the trusted partner we wished we had — combining deep supplier networks in China with the transparency that international entrepreneurs deserve.

Today we serve entrepreneurs across 30+ countries, from Lagos to São Paulo to Manila.

Our Mission

Make China sourcing accessible, safe, and profitable for every entrepreneur in the world — regardless of experience or budget.

500+ Entrepreneurs served
$2M+ In goods sourced & delivered
30+ Countries reached
98% First-order satisfaction

What We Stand For

Four Values,
One Standard

01

Trust First

We only recommend suppliers we have personally vetted. Your money is safe because we treat every transaction as our own.

02

Global Perspective

Our team spans China and multiple continents. We understand the cultural context on both sides of every deal.

03

Radical Transparency

Supplier price, shipping cost, our fee — you see every number before committing. No hidden markups ever.

04

End-to-End Ownership

From first inquiry to delivery confirmation, one dedicated agent handles your entire journey. We don't hand you off.

The People

Meet the
CrossPals Team

Wei Zhang

Head of Sourcing, Yiwu

12 years sourcing across Yiwu, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen markets. Fluent in supplier psychology.

Amara Osei

Client Success, Africa & Middle East

Former entrepreneur who built her own China-sourced brand. Now she helps others do the same.

Carlos Mendez

Latin America Operations

Logistics specialist with deep knowledge of import regulations across Mexico, Brazil, and Colombia.

On the Ground

From Factory Floor
to Your Door

Work With Us

Sourcing Journey?

Send us your first inquiry — no commitment. We'll show you exactly what sourcing from China can look like for your business.
